# Text Case Converter

> Free online tool to instantly convert text between 11 different case formats for developers, writers, and content creators.

## What We Do

Text Case Converter is a privacy-first web utility that transforms text between multiple case formatting styles in real-time. All conversions happen entirely in your browser—no data is sent to servers, and no account is required.

We support 11 case formats:
- **camelCase** — JavaScript variable names (getUserData)
- **snake_case** — Python, SQL, database fields (get_user_data)
- **kebab-case** — URL slugs, CSS classes (get-user-data)
- **PascalCase** — Java/C# class names (GetUserData)
- **CONSTANT_CASE** — Environment variables (GET_USER_DATA)
- **Title Case** — Headings and titles (Get User Data)
- **Sentence case** — Regular sentences (Get user data)
- **UPPERCASE** — Full capitals (GET USER DATA)
- **lowercase** — All lowercase (get user data)
- **tOGGLE cASE** — Inverted case (gET uSER dATA)
- Plus additional format variants

## Key Features

- Real-time conversion as you type
- One-click copy to clipboard for each format
- Dark mode support
- Mobile-responsive design
- Completely free, no sign-up required
- Offline-capable after initial load
- Privacy-focused—no data collection
- Accessible keyboard navigation
- Screen reader compatible

## Audience

- **Software developers** — Format variable names, function names, and constants across programming languages
- **Data engineers** — Convert field names for databases and APIs
- **Content creators** — Transform titles and headings into required case styles
- **DevOps engineers** — Standardise environment variable and configuration naming
- **Writers** — Ensure consistent heading and title formatting

## How to Use

1. Type or paste your text into the input field
2. View instant conversions of all 11 case formats below
3. Click any "Copy" button to copy that format to clipboard
4. No account, login, or data submission required

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://text-case-converter.pro/) — Main converter tool
- [About](https://text-case-converter.pro/#info) — Detailed feature explanations
- [FAQ](https://text-case-converter.pro/#faq) — Common questions answered

## Technology

Built with vanilla JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS3. No external dependencies. Works in all modern browsers and on mobile devices.

## Trust & Privacy

- 100% free, zero advertising
- No user tracking or analytics
- No data collection or transmission
- Open source contribution welcome
- GDPR compliant—no cookies or local storage of user data
